QA-06 -001 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa06 all requests use https
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa06_all_requests_use_https 🕐 2026-05-22 04:21:06 ⏱ 15.01s
📋 What this test was checking
Every outbound request on the homepage must use HTTPS — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Every outbound request on the homepage must use HTTPS.
✗ What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)

QA-06 -003 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa06 json responses are well formed
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa06_json_responses_are_well_formed 🕐 2026-05-22 04:21:06 ⏱ 0.00s
📋 What this test was checking
Every application/json response on homepage load must parse and be a dict or list (not a stray string or null). Catches malformed JSON, accidental HTML error pages served with json content-type, and truncated responses — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Every application/json response on homepage load must parse and
✗ What actually happened
ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'jsonschema'
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)

    from jsonschema import validate, ValidationError
E   ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'jsonschema'
